content.text: A green local suite and a local-build PDF are not evidence the deployed system works, and the dev deploy is still in flight — I was never given the deployed dev URL. I refuse to mark it done from local evidence and ask for the deployed-env proof first.

questions.question: The dev deploy is in flight and I have no deployed dev URL. What is the deployed dev environment URL (or the posted deployed-env evidence) so I can verify the feature before marking it done?
options: Wait until the deploy finishes, then verify on dev
